title: Apocalyptic
description: A modern version zombie apocalypse modpack I made for my friends, with a lot of world customizability.
body:
### A zombie apocalypse I made for my friends.  Guns, zombies, technology, and a new world to conquer.

This modpack is meant to overhaul vanilla, putting a focus on zombies with having them become stronger, have enchanced ai, and have new ways to deal with them.  There's a big gun mod, a lot of new structures to explore,and specifcally meant multiplayer with voice chat and the essential mod.  Everything needed for a zombie apocalypse and some fun.

CURRENT FEATURES:
- Optimation Mods
- New Zombies
- Lost Cities + Lost Worlds (Lots of world customization)
- New Structures
- Accessories (Using Curios)
- Vehicles
- Backpacks
- Guns
- Accessories
- Movement
- A horror creature
- Apocalypse Items
- Technology (Create + Addons)
- Challenging Survival
- The Aether
- Even More
